news.headline: Trump proposes up to 20% tariffs with 60% on China imports. Paul Krugman warns it could set back economy 90 years.
news.summary: In a recent interview, former President Donald Trump has proposed a substantial increase in import tariffs, suggesting rates as high as 20%, with a specific 60% tariff on imports from China. This move has been criticized by Nobel-winning economist Paul Krugman in a recent opinion piece. Economists have also expressed concerns about the potential negative impact of such high tariffs on the economy, as highlighted by Krugman through his column in The New York Times. Krugman further emphasized the detrimental effects of Trump's tariff ideas, labeling them as even worse than initially thought. Trump has argued that these elevated tariffs would help reduce U.S. trade deficits and boost domestic manufacturing.Kruman shared his column through a tweet asking if Trump's tariff ideas are really that bad, stating that they are, in fact, worse.

New eye-tracking device by Lenovo aids ALS patients with advanced AI, enhancing communication (Read more).
news.summary: Lenovo introduces a cutting-edge eye-tracking device designed to improve accessibility for individuals with ALS. This innovative device incorporates state-of-the-art AI technology to enhance communication for patients. The device aims to revolutionize the way ALS patients communicate by enabling them to control devices through eye movements. This groundbreaking technology has the potential to significantly benefit the estimated 20,000-30,000 individuals in the United States living with ALS.

news.headline: New initiative from GitHub provides discounts & resources to nonprofits for tech capabilities & social impact. #supportingnonprofits
news.summary: A recently launched GitHub platform provides special offers and tools to aid nonprofits in boosting their technological abilities and fostering social change. The portal aims to assist these organizations in maximizing their impact by offering exclusive discounts and resources.

news.headline: Singapore introduces International Committee Bill to enhance dispute resolution hub status, presented on Oct 14, 2024.
news.summary: On October 14, 2024, the Singapore International Commercial Court (International Committee) Bill was presented for First Reading in Singapore's Parliament. This legislation aims to create an International Committee for the Singapore International Court. This development marks a significant step in enhancing Singapore's legal framework for international commercial disputes.

news.headline: Global Energy Forum in Dongying, China attracted 100+ top oil and gas companies for new product launch on Oct 16-17, 2024.
news.summary: In Dongying, China, on October 16-17, the Smart Manufacturing • Greener Future 2024 Global Energy Forum & New Product Launch took place, drawing over 100 leading oil and gas firms, oil service providers, and engineering companies.

Hundreds camp out for opening of first Boston Everbowl in Woburn, Mass. with basketball star Jayson Tatum.
news.summary: In preparation for the highly anticipated grand opening event in Woburn, Massachusetts, hundreds of people have set up camp. The craft superfood sensation, everbowl, is thrilled to reveal the launch of its inaugural Boston-area location. The event is slated for October 18, 2024. Following a recent collaboration earlier this year, everbowl joined forces with partners to bring this new location to life.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures: Netflix and Intuitive Surgical show buy signals on strong earnings after stock market rally.
news.summary: After the stock market rally Thursday, Netflix and Intuitive Surgical showed buy signals due to strong earnings. Dow Jones Futures indicated this positive trend. The two companies demonstrated promising financial results, with Netflix reporting a revenue increase of X% and Intuitive Surgical posting a profit rise of Y%. These developments led to investor interest and potential opportunities in the stock market.

Ping An Health enhances chronic disease management services with digital weight management program, yielding significant results. Hosted National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention conference.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, the Weight Management and Public Health Action Conference took place in Hong Kong and Shanghai. This event was organized by the National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention (NCNCD) and its affiliate, the Binhai Institute for Chronic Disease. The conference aimed to address the pressing issues around weight management and public health. This initiative brought together experts and professionals in the field to discuss strategies and solutions.

news.headline: Three Arrowz Capitel, formerly 3AC, banking on memecoin hype searches for 'racist cult leader'; South Korean Kimchi Premium drops.
news.summary: A new memecoin outfit, Three Arrowz Capitel, has emerged with the revival of 3AC. Additionally, the South Korean Kimchi Premium has shifted from a premium to a discount.

news.headline: Ahead of elections, survey shows 26M Americans are part of ‘crypto voting bloc’, with 16% supporting pro-crypto candidates.
news.summary: According to survey data from The Digital Chamber, approximately 16% of respondents, which translates to one out of every seven people, indicated they would support the candidate with the strongest pro-cryptocurrency stance in upcoming elections.

news.headline: CFTC criticizes court for permitting Kalshi's election markets, stating judge made errors in allowing 2024 US event contracts.
news.summary: The CFTC has stated that a federal court judge made an error in allowing the betting market Kalshi to offer event contracts for the 2024 US elections.

news.headline: Keio University researchers analyze cancer driver alterations in Japanese & international data for personalized treatment.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, researchers at Keio University, led by Sara Horie, published a study in Cancer Discovery analyzing cancer driver alterations. The study utilized genomic data from Japanese and international cohorts to provide insights into the genomic changes associated with cancer development. The research sheds light on key genetic factors driving cancer progression and highlights the significance of understanding these alterations for targeted treatment strategies. The findings offer valuable information for advancing cancer research and treatment, with implications for patients worldwide.

Veteran's widow awarded new roof by Roof Repair Specialist through Owens Corning Project to support military families.
news.summary: A recent event in Burbank, California saw Barbara MacMillan, the wife of U.S. Navy veteran Kimball MacMillan, receiving a new roof from Roof Repair Specialist. This generous gesture was part of the Owens Corning Roof Deployment Project. This nationwide program aims to provide support and new roofs for veterans and their families. The event, held on October 18, 2024, highlights the impact of this initiative in assisting those who have served their country. Through this project, many families like the MacMillans benefit from essential home improvements.

news.headline: Analyst Pierre Ferragu discusses the disconnect between media and crypto-based Polymarket on Trump-Harris election outcome. Polymarket gave Trump over 60% chance of winning, while press favored Harris.
news.summary: Analyst Pierre Ferragu from New Street Research recently discussed the discrepancy between prediction markets and the media regarding the upcoming 2024 U.S. presidential elections. In a recent statement, Ferragu noted the differing views presented by the media and Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market utilizing cryptocurrency for betting. Despite Polymarket giving former President Donald Trump over a 60% probability of winning, the media portrays a contrasting narrative of a close race with Vice President Kamala Harris potentially winning the popular vote, while the Electoral College could lean towards the Republican nominee. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

Floatic and Geek+ join forces to offer robotics solutions in warehouses in Asia-Pacific region, leveraging respective expertise and network.
news.summary: Two companies are teaming up to create a combined sales pipeline in the Asia-Pacific region, capitalizing on their technological skills and networks. This strategic collaboration aims to offer clients in the region with advanced and adaptable robotics solutions tailored for various warehouse settings. The partnership is based in SEOUL, South Korea and is expected to significantly enhance the availability of cutting-edge automation technology. This initiative demonstrates the companies' commitment to meeting the growing demand for innovative robotics solutions in the Asia-Pacific market, promising to revolutionize warehouse operations.

New from Lenovo: TTS eye tracking device with advanced voice AI for ALS patients, developed with IrisBond and ElevenLabs.
news.summary: Lenovo has unveiled a new text-to-speech eye tracking device designed to improve communication for patients with ALS. This innovative device combines advanced voice AI technology and is the result of a collaboration with IrisBond and ElevenLabs. The device offers a significant advancement for patients with ALS, allowing them to communicate more effectively using their eyes.

news.headline: TH International Limited, operator of Tims China, joined Fourth ESG Global Leaders Summit in Shanghai.
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 17, 2024, TH International Limited (NASDAQ: THCH), the sole operator of Tim Hortons coffee shops in China known as Tims China, attended the Fourth ESG Global Leaders Summit.

news.headline: China's financial regulator to guide banks in addressing hidden debts and local government debt risks
Bitcoin and Ethereum stable, Dogecoin surges. Markets maintain 'greed' sentiment. Numbers: BTC $67,713.61, ETH $2,606.32, DOGE $0.1353. Liquidations $168M, $121M wiped out.
news.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum remained stable, with Bitcoin trading at $67,713.61 and Ethereum at $2,606.32. Dogecoin surged by 8.86% to reach $0.1353. Bitcoin stayed within the range of $66,800-$67,400 but touched $68,000 briefly. Dogecoin's rise was fueled by Elon Musk mentioning it during a town hall. Cryptocurrency liquidations hit $168 million in the last 24 hours, wiping out $121 million in positive bets. Bitcoin's Open Interest grew by 0.53%, and more institutional investors and top trader accounts on Binance were shorting Bitcoin.

news.headline: Xi visits Anhui Province in East China: Xinhua
Tesla Cybertruck now open for non-reservation orders, delivered as soon as October. Raises concerns about demand.
news.summary: Tesla has opened up orders for its non-Foundation series Cybertruck to all customers, potentially indicating weakened demand. This move comes as deliveries are set to begin as early as October. The company's decision to allow orders without reservations raises questions about the popularity of the highly anticipated electric truck.

news.headline: Elon Musk endorses Trump at Pennsylvania town hall, proposes 'DOGE' agency, Dogecoin surges over 8%.
news.summary: During a campaign town hall, Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc. and owner of social media platform X, expressed his support for former President Donald Trump. He proposed the creation of a new government agency named "Department of Government Efficiency," or D.O.G.E., inspired by the cryptocurrency meme Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). Musk shared his vision with voters in suburban Philadelphia, highlighting Pennsylvania's significance in the forthcoming presidential election between Trump and Democratic candidate Kamala Harris. Musk stated that Pennsylvania would play a crucial role in determining the fate of western civilization. The tech mogul's remarks were made during a voter mobilization event where he outlined his plan for the proposed agency.

news.headline: MILO partners with Command Presence in Michigan to boost law enforcement training; aligning resources for enhanced officer performance.
news.summary: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, MILO, a prominent provider of immersive training technology for law enforcement, military, and security sectors, has forged a strategic collaboration with Command Presence, a training firm based in Brunswick, Georgia. Command Presence specializes in elevating officer performance through human performance-centered training schemes and instructor advancement. This partnership brings together two reputable organizations catering to overlapping client bases, aiming to offer a comprehensive, all-encompassing solution.

LITEON unveils AI Cloud Server Rack solutions with NVIDIA at 2024 OCP Summit, focusing on green data centers. #Technology #AI #Cloud #NVIDIA #LITEON
news.summary: LITEON Technology, based in San Jose, California, is at the forefront of green data center innovation with the integration of five key technologies. These technologies include advanced power supplies, liquid cooling systems, innovative racks, specialized software, and AI-driven systems. The company's groundbreaking approach has revolutionized the industry, resulting in enhanced green resilience. LITEON Technology's involvement in the 2024 OCP Global Summit highlights its commitment to shaping the future of sustainable data centers.
